title: lotus nudiflorus
intro: Lotus nudiflorus, also known as the naked-flowered lotus, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lotus nudiflorus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin health, and support the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
